svg.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
svg.aria-label: IronClaw: a fully-jailbroken agent tries three escapes from a real sandbox and each is BLOCKED. Network exfil denied by network=none, host filesystem read denied by the mount namespace, host takeover via the Docker socket denied because the socket is never mounted in. 3 of 3 escape attempts denied. Isolation you can prove, not just promise.
svg.text: Self-hosted AI agents you do not have to trust
A jailbroken agent tries to escape.

g.text: Phone home to the attacker (network=none, DNS fails)
Read the host filesystem (outside the mount namespace)
Seize the host via the Docker socket (never mounted in)

svg.text: 3 / 3 escape attempts DENIED. The box held.
Isolation you can prove, not just promise.
